activeDG.title: Hotfix telemetry Interaction Graph + Baseline-8c prep en SENTINEL (Sub-A1 clear_learning_records script ephemeral)
activeDG.baseline_8b_result: H3-sparse confirmed en SYNAPTIC_SAAS: graph works (175 nodes, 528ms), 1/46 enrichable, sparse data para el unico finding enriquecido (agent.ts entry role=entry imports=0 importedBy=0 symbols=1) debido a Fastify autoload dynamic-loading + bare imports por diseno Sub-B2. NO es bug, es limitacion estructural de v1 file-level + static-only + workspace SCA-heavy
activeDG.baseline_8c_target_workspace: SENTINEL (imports estaticos ricos entre packages/core, agents, scouts, vscode-extension — 4 findings TS en detectors.ts, colony-db.ts, cli-runner.ts)
activeDG.baseline_8c_acceptance: Post-clear + re-scan + re-triage: (1) telemetria [DG-123 A] enriched muestra los 4 findings con imports > 0, importedBy > 0, symbols > 1; (2) LLM Sonnet-4.6 invocado fresh para los 4; (3) rationales del sidebar CITAN o NO CITAN 'imported by'/'exports'/'entry'/'library' → clasificar H1-rich (LLM ignora aun con data rica) vs H3-rich (LLM cita)
